things.name: Ciqikou Ancient Town
things.description: Ming and Qing-era riverside town with cobblestone streets and traditional tea houses

things.name: Yangtze River Cruise
things.description: Multi-day cruise through the spectacular Three Gorges to the world's largest dam

things.name: Dazu Rock Carvings
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Tang and Song dynasty Buddhist cliff carvings in a forested valley

things.name: Hongya Cave (Hongyadong)
things.description: Stilt house complex of 11 storeys built into the riverbank cliffs - spectacular at night

things.name: Three Gorges Museum
things.description: History of the great river civilisation and the submerged Three Gorges towns

things.name: Eling Park
things.description: Hilltop park with the best views of the Yangtze and Jialing River confluence

things.name: Chongqing Monorail through buildings
things.description: The No.2 monorail line passes through the upper floors of a residential building

things.name: Jiefangbei Pedestrian Street
things.description: Chongqing's most celebrated shopping street with the Victory Monument at its centre

things.name: Shibati (18 Steps) Historic Area
things.description: Preserved steps of the old lower city with rickshaws, noodle stalls and cave dwellings

things.name: Chongqing Mala Hotpot
things.description: The world's spiciest hotpot - Chongqing invented the tongue-numbing mala broth
